description_long: This shotgun features a robust wooden full stock with a smooth, polished finish, extending into a metal receiver and barrel assembly. The barrel is relatively short and features a perforated heat shield along its length, likely for improved cooling and grip. A prominent, boxy magazine protrudes beneath the receiver, indicating a magazine-fed design. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger placement. The metal components, including the barrel, receiver, and magazine, have a matte black finish, contrasting with the warm brown wood of the stock. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible screws and mechanical details suggesting durability and functionality.
description: A magazine-fed shotgun with a polished wooden full stock, matte black metal barrel with a perforated heat shield, and a prominent box magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, perforated barrel shroud, and box magazine beneath the receiver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, heat shield perforations, and the width of the magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the smooth wooden stock, metal receiver, and the box magazine from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and magazine.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a perforated heat shield
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
